scope: demo mode · 4 cities · all home sections
engine: Detect v1 (Phase 1) — parallel subagent sweep + gentle re-verify
note: Reconstructed from the Session 123 record (STATUS + CHANGELOG) so Triage has a clean input for its first live run. The S123 sweep raised 9 first-pass flags: 7 were ruled out on gentle re-verify (5 named here + 1 aggregate standing for the 2 unnamed), and 2 were real P2 fixes; the image-health pass + latent-code observations additionally filed DEMO-5/6/7 and a LIVE-bleed follow-up. Findings carry NO verdict — triage.py derives each verdict by matching against the ignore-list, BACKLOG and CHANGELOG.

findings.symptom: Wave-1 (NY/London/Sydney) Adventures Stays/Experiences sub-tabs render empty ("No Adventures yet").
findings.root_cause: Wave-1 adventures tagged bare cat:Adventures; missing adventures_experiences sub-type + no accommodation rows.

findings.symptom: 4 demo cards show a dead placeholder image while the detail view shows a live hero.
findings.root_cause: card/featured/my-requests/local-market render scalar l.photo; detail renders photos[0]||photo; 23 Wave-1 listings diverge.

findings.symptom: On LIVE, an empty city (Sydney) shows full demo totals + a 4-city Featured strip.
findings.root_cause: switch-to-live does not purge demo listings; the !DEMO_MODE demo_ guard incomplete at 3 sites; selectCity never re-renders Featured/HomeStats.

findings.symptom: 27 dead Unsplash URLs sit in the secondary gallery of 34 demo listings (hero fine; only seen on swipe).
findings.root_cause: demo_listings.json secondary photos[] gallery URLs rotted/fabricated.
renderAdvGrid hardcodes the price suffix by type and ignores the data per field.

findings.symptom: Latent: a future non-placeholder paused demo listing could inflate a category tile count.
findings.root_cause: renderCatCounts excludes ph_ placeholders but not l.paused.

findings.symptom: Suspected Adventure grid vs detail currency mismatch (R89 vs $89).
findings.root_cause: Suspected grid price label not country-aware.

findings.symptom: Suspected ph_ placeholder cards leak into other cities' category counts.
findings.root_cause: Suspected ph_ rows not excluded from the count path.

findings.symptom: Suspected category tile row differs across cities.
findings.root_cause: Suspected per-city divergence in the tile row.

findings.symptom: Suspected World Heritage strip stuck on the demo country after demo→live.
findings.root_cause: Suspected _wfCountry not reset on mode switch.

findings.symptom: Aggregate: 2 further first-pass flags ruled out on gentle re-verify (not individually named in the S123 record).
findings.root_cause: Aggregate placeholder so the 7-of-9 false-positive count reconciles (5 named + 2 here).
